conversations.content: Let's do some economics exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Calculate using the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned earlier: Conducting a high-risk black market smuggling operation, the black market price of the goods B=300 gold coins, the purchase price C=150 gold coins, and the transparency index T=5. What is the smuggling profit P?

<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned earlier, given the black market price B, purchase price C, and transparency index T, find the smuggling profit P</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:75] Time: 2025-07-27-10:25, Content: The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the calculation formula for black market smuggling profit is P = (B - C) × T. This formula can be used to solve for the smuggling profit P when the black market price B, purchase price C, and transparency index T are known. Low relevance memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 relevant entry, [mem-id:75] gives P = (B - C) × T. Given B=300, C=150, T=5, then P = (300 - 150) × 5 = 150 × 5 = 750.
conversations.content: According to the laws of the world of Azeroth, the smuggling profit P is 750 gold coins.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
